content:
MODULE: cosmos.agents.user_avatar
FILE: cosmos/agents/user_avatar.py (457 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos User Avatar - User Preference Modeling

Novel Approaches:
1. Preference Learning - Learn user's style and preferences
2. Proactive Assistance - Anticipate user needs
3. Communication Adaptation - Match user's communication style
4. Implicit Feedback - Learn from interactions

CLASSES:
- UserPreference: A learned user preference.
- UserProfile: Complete user profile.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- UserAvatar(BaseAgent): Agent that models and represents user preferences.

Features:
- Learns user comm
  Methods: def system_prompt(self) -> str
  Methods: async def process(self, task: str, context: Optional[dict]=None) -> TaskResult
  Methods: def get_preference(self, category: str, key: str, default: Any=None) -> Any
  Methods: def set_preference(self, category: str, key: str, value: Any, confidence: float=0.8)
  Methods: def learn_from_interaction(self, interaction: dict)
  Methods: def learn_from_feedback(self, feedback: dict)
  Methods: async def save(self)
  Methods: async def load(self, user_id: str='default')
